scope: Finish the immediate deploy/bootstrap blockers after the D1-backed Day 7 alpha commit.

next_step_blocks.resolution: Verified Cloudflare Pages deployment for commit 17a04f3, alpha.html, /api/alpha/state, and /api/health.

next_step_blocks.block: Production health was inheriting local APP_ENV
next_step_blocks.resolution: Moved APP_ENV into the deploy vars as production and kept APP_ENV=local only in .dev.vars.example.
Reduced PBKDF2-SHA-256 to a Workers-compatible 100000 iterations and wrapped credential generation inside the bootstrap failure handler.

next_step_blocks.block: One-time bootstrap key had to be removed after first admin creation
next_step_blocks.resolution: Removed BOOTSTRAP_SETUP_KEY from Cloudflare Pages production config and redeployed so the live bootstrap endpoint returns 403.

external_changes: D1 first admin account created for bryan.timm89@gmail.com with global admin role.
validation: Cloudflare Pages deployment 2aadfa71 succeeded for commit 17a04f3.
D1 verified active user, global admin role, and bootstrap_admin_created audit event.
Login and /api/auth/me verified the first admin session and role.
Bootstrap endpoint returned 403 after the one-time setup key was removed and redeployed.
Bundled Node alpha state-machine tests passed.
Bundled Node syntax checks passed for app.js, alpha.js, functions/_lib/alpha-flow-model.js, and functions/api/alpha/state.js.
remaining_blockers: Google Drive server-side credential/OAuth and file-byte upload flow are not implemented.
Broader auth, role/permission, evidence access, status transition, audit/export, meeting, and presentation-slot tests are still needed.
Account provisioning/import, invitation, password reset, and credential rotation are still needed before pilot use.
Alpha demo-state transitions need to be split into real workflow endpoints.
commit_push_status: Code commits 992354a and 17a04f3 pushed; documentation/status commit pending.
